summary: Complete testing of Phase PDF Pointages et PWA Mobile Chauffeur features. All 23 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend UI elements working correctly. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in notes-frais creation endpoint.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/chauffeur/login with valid code returns session
Backend: POST /api/chauffeur/login with invalid code returns 401
Backend: GET /api/pointages/{id}/pdf generates PDF for single pointage
Backend: GET /api/pointages/{id}/pdf returns 404 for non-existent pointage
Backend: GET /api/chantiers/{id}/pointages/pdf generates recap PDF for chantier
Backend: GET /api/chantiers/{id}/pointages/pdf returns 404 for non-existent chantier
Backend: GET /api/notes-frais returns list of expense notes
Backend: GET /api/notes-frais?chauffeur_id filters by chauffeur
Backend: POST /api/notes-frais creates carburant expense note
Backend: POST /api/notes-frais creates péage expense note
Backend: POST /api/notes-frais creates repas expense note
Backend: POST /api/notes-frais creates expense note with photo (base64)
Backend: GET /api/notes-frais/{id} retrieves specific expense note
Backend: PUT /api/notes-frais/{id}/statut updates expense note status
Backend: DELETE /api/notes-frais/{id} deletes expense note
Backend: POST /api/sync/pointages syncs single offline pointage
Backend: POST /api/sync/pointages syncs multiple offline pointages
Backend: POST /api/sync/pointages updates existing pointage for same date/chauffeur/chantier
Backend: GET /api/factures/{id}/justificatifs returns pointages for facture
Backend: GET /api/factures/{id}/justificatifs/pdf generates justificatifs PDF
Backend: GET /api/factures/{id}/justificatifs returns 404 for non-existent facture
Backend: GET /api/chauffeur/{id}/chantiers returns chauffeur's assigned chantiers
Frontend: Chauffeur login page loads with code input
Frontend: Chauffeur portal shows online/offline indicator
Frontend: Chauffeur portal has chantier selection dropdown
Frontend: Chauffeur portal has date and heures inputs
Frontend: Chauffeur portal has Tours section with add tour button
Frontend: Chauffeur portal has Note de frais button opening sheet
Frontend: Note de frais sheet has expense type buttons (Carburant, Péage, Repas, Hébergement, Autre)
Frontend: Note de frais sheet has photo capture button
Frontend: Factures page shows list of factures with PDF buttons
Frontend: Facture detail dialog shows Justificatifs (Pointages) button
Frontend: Pointages page shows PDF button on each row
Frontend: Chantiers page shows PDF recap button on each row
Frontend: PWA manifest.json accessible at /manifest.json
Frontend: Service worker sw.js accessible at /sw.js

bugs_fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error in notes-frais creation - insert_one adds _id to dict which is not JSON serializable
bugs_fixed.fix: Added deletion of _id from note_dict before returning: if '_id' in note_dict: del note_dict['_id']

seed_data_creation: Test notes de frais created during testing were cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase PDF Pointages et PWA Mobile Chauffeur fully working. PDF generation uses WeasyPrint. Notes de frais support photo upload via base64. Offline sync uses IndexedDB on frontend and POST /api/sync/pointages on backend. PWA manifest and service worker are configured for chauffeur portal. Justificatifs button on Factures page downloads PDF of all pointages for the facture's chantier.

pdf_pointage_journalier.description: Generates PDF for single pointage with chauffeur, chantier, tours details

pdf_recap_chantier.description: Generates recap PDF of all pointages for a chantier

justificatifs_facture.description: Returns pointages associated with facture and generates PDF

offline_sync.description: Syncs offline pointages, creates new or updates existing
